query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of assorted hand tools piled together, including a silver adjustable wrench, a translucent red and yellow screwdriver, green-handled pliers, wooden tool handles, and various metal hardware pieces.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grainy, low-detail amateur snapshot of assorted hand tools including a silver adjustable wrench, green-handled pliers, and a translucent red and yellow screwdriver, featuring casual cluttered framing and smeared textures that lack crisp definition across the frame.
